dict.string: Regal Recovery uses Face ID to protect your recovery data so only you can access your journal, logs, and personal information.
Regal Recovery accesses your contacts to help you quickly add your sponsor, counselor, and accountability partners to your support network.
Regal Recovery uses your location to find SA and Celebrate Recovery meetings near you and to provide context in your time journal.
Regal Recovery uses your location to find nearby meetings and provide context in your time journal, even when the app is in the background.
Regal Recovery uses this to understand how our app is discovered, helping us reach more people in recovery. Your recovery data is never shared with advertisers.
Regal Recovery uses the camera to let you capture photos for your gratitude journal and recovery milestones.
